title: Varaha Nadhikara Oram Lyrics Sangamam
stanzas:
Sangamam Varaha Nadhikara Oram Song Lyrics
Singer:Shankar Mahadevan,
Music:AR Rahman,
Lyrics:Vairamuthu,

kannil varum kaatchi ellaam
kanmaniye uruthum
kaanadha un uruvam
kannukulle inikkum

varaha nadhikara oram
orey oru paarva paarthaen
puraave nillunu sonnen
kanaavaai odi maranjen (2)

kannil varum kaatchi ellaam
kanmaniye uruthum
kaanadha un uruvam
kannukulle inikkum (2)

kannu bakku
bakku bakkungudhu
ullam dhikku
dhikku dhikkungudhu
nenju jallu jallu
jallungudhu
sollu sollu sollu
sollungudhu

varaha nadhikara oram
orey oru paarva paarthaen
puraave nillunu sonnen
kanaavaai odi maranjen

panjavarna kili
nee pirantha pinnalum
anju varnam nenjil irukku (2)

parandhu vandhu…
virundhu kodu..
manasukkulla
sadukudu sadukudu

mayakkathukku
marudhonnu kodu kodu
ohhh.
kaveri karayil maramaa
irundhaa
vaerukku yogamadi

en kai endrum
dhaavani aanaal
kadhal pazhukkumadi

kannu thakku
thakku thakkungudhu
ulla dhikku dhikku
dhikkungudhu
nenju jallu
jallu jallungudhu
sollu sollu
sollu sollungudhu

varaha nadhikara oram
orey oru paarva paarthaen
puraave nillunu sonnen
kanaavaai odi maranjen

kannil varum kaatchi ellaam
kanmaniye uruthum
kaanadha un uruvam
kannukulle inikkum (2)

nee enna kadandhu
pogayila un
nizhala pudichikitten

nizhalukkulla ..
kudiyirukken ..
udamba vittu usur
mattum thalli nikka

kilinja nenja edhakondu
naanum thaikka

o. oththa vizhiyil
paarvayil ooduruva paarthu
thaappaa therichiiruchu
thaappaa therichiiruchu

kannu thakku
thakku thakkungudhu
ulla dhikku dhikku
dhikkungudhu
nenju jallu
jallu jallungudhu
sollu sollu
sollu sollungudhu

varaha nadhikara oram
orey oru paarva paarthaen

seo.title: Varaha Nadhikara Oram Lyrics Sangamam
seo.description: Full Varaha Nadhikara Oram songs lyrics, Sangamam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Sangamam, AR Rahman, Shankar Mahadevan, Varaha Nadhikara Oram full lyrics, Sangamam songs lyrics, Varaha Nadhikara Oram lyrics snippets, Varaha Nadhikara Oram WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Varaha Nadhikara Oram lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sangamam, this song highlights the emotional connection between the lead characters, enhancing the narrative of love and sacrifice.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 16, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Varaha Nadhikara Oram, the listener is enveloped in a world of romantic nostalgia, where the lyrics evoke a sense of yearning and beauty. The song plays a pivotal role in Sangamam, reflecting the emotional turmoil and passion of the characters. Shankar Mahadevan's powerful rendition, combined with AR Rahman's masterful composition, creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. This timeless piece captures the essence of longing, making it a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Varaha Nadhikara Oram from Sangamam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Shankar Mahadevan's soulful vocals and AR Rahman's enchanting composition, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: All the sights that come to the eyes are sweet, your form is also sweet in my eyes.
I saw a single view of the Varaha Nadhikara, I said to the world, I will run towards you and die.
All the sights that come to the eyes are sweet, your form is also sweet in my eyes.
My eyes are blinking, my heart is beating, my mind is racing, I keep saying things.
I saw a single view of the Varaha Nadhikara, I said to the world, I will run towards you and die.
You are a five-colored parrot, even after being born, five colors remain in my heart.
Come flying and serve, it will satisfy the mind.
For the intoxication, give me a little, ohhh. If the Kaveri flows, it will be a different experience.
My hands are always in motion, but love is also a habit.
My eyes are blinking, my heart is beating, my mind is racing, I keep saying things.
I saw a single view of the Varaha Nadhikara, I said to the world, I will run towards you and die.
All the sights that come to the eyes are sweet, your form is also sweet in my eyes.
You have crossed over, I have caught your shadow.
I am living in the shadow, leaving my body and just holding on to my breath.
With a broken heart, I am also crying.
In one eye, I saw a view and realized the mistake, I realized the mistake.
My eyes are blinking, my heart is beating, my mind is racing, I keep saying things.
I saw a single view of the Varaha Nadhikara, I said to the world, I will run towards you and die.
All the sights that come to the eyes are sweet, your form is also sweet in my eyes.
